hooks.command:
COMMAND=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$COMMAND" | tr ';' '
' | sed 's/&&/
/g' | sed 's/||/
/g' | grep -E '(rm|rmdir|unlink)' | grep -qE 'archived'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Blocked: destructive command targeting archived/ directory. Use /archive-first:archived-unlock to disable protection first."}}'; else exit 0; fi

FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '/archived/'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Blocked: cannot write to archived/ directory. Use /archive-first:unlock to remove protection first."}}'; else exit 0; fi

FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '/archived/'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"Blocked: cannot edit files in archived/ directory. Use /archive-first:unlock to remove protection first."}}'; else exit 0; fi
